lessons.title: Decision log format mismatch in session state
lessons.observation: Requirements agent generated decision_log entries with id format 'DL-001' and 'decision' field instead of required 'D001' format with 'agent', 'title', 'choice' fields
lessons.expected: Decision log entries should match schema: id=D001, required fields: agent, title, choice, rationale
lessons.root_cause: Agent did not read session state schema validation rules before writing decision_log
lessons.recommendation: Add decision_log schema example to Requirements agent prompt or include schema validation in session-resume skill

lessons.title: Requirements extracted invented NFRs not in source RFP
lessons.observation: Requirements agent introduced concrete targets (RTO 4h, RPO 1h, page load 2s, API p95 500ms) that were not stated in the RFQ
lessons.expected: Extraction should distinguish source-backed requirements from analyst assumptions
lessons.root_cause: Agent tendency to fill in reasonable defaults without marking them as assumptions
lessons.recommendation: Add explicit instruction to Requirements agent: 'Mark all non-RFP values as assumptions, not requirements'

lessons.title: Azure Front Door EU Data Boundary exclusion not caught by architect
lessons.observation: Architecture assessment recommended Front Door for CDN/edge without noting its exclusion from EU Data Boundary
lessons.expected: Architect should flag Front Door's global anycast as incompatible with RFQ Section 4.3 EU-only requirement
lessons.root_cause: Architect did not verify EU Data Boundary service compatibility for each recommended service
lessons.recommendation: Add EU Data Boundary compatibility check to Architect agent for GDPR/EU-residency projects. Create a reference list of Azure services excluded from EU Data Boundary.

lessons.title: AVM parameter schema mismatches in Phase 2 data modules
lessons.observation: PostgreSQL, Redis, and Storage modules required 5 build iterations due to AVM parameter schema differences from expected API
lessons.expected: AVM modules should be generated correctly on first attempt using documented parameter schemas
lessons.root_cause: AVM module APIs differ from raw Azure Resource Manager APIs - agent used ARM-style parameters instead of AVM-specific abstracted parameters
lessons.recommendation: Pre-compute AVM parameter schemas in the AVM matrix (Phase D.5) by looking up actual module documentation, not just module paths and versions

lessons.title: Application Gateway AVM module incompatible with WAF_v2 configuration
lessons.observation: AVM App Gateway module 0.9.0 uses abstracted API that doesn't support full WAF_v2 configuration, requiring fallback to native ARM resource
lessons.expected: AVM matrix should identify when AVM modules have limitations requiring native resource declarations
lessons.root_cause: AVM module abstraction level varies - some modules wrap the full ARM API, others simplify it in ways incompatible with complex configurations
lessons.recommendation: Add complexity assessment to AVM matrix: flag modules where advanced features may require native ARM fallback

lessons.title: Entra External ID MFA sovereignty gap not flagged by architect
lessons.observation: Architecture assessment approved Entra External ID with conditional MFA without constraining MFA factor choices for EU Data Boundary compliance
lessons.expected: Architect should identify that PSTN/SMS MFA can be processed outside EU and recommend FIDO2/TOTP only
lessons.root_cause: Agent did not check Entra ID's partial EU Data Boundary compliance status
lessons.recommendation: Add Entra ID EU Data Boundary compliance check to Architect agent's security assessment workflow
